Comment: Fries were cold and stale, burger patty was dry. Not worth it.
Cashier was rude and ignored me while talking to coworkers. Waited 10 minutes at counter.
Drive-thru took over 15 minutes with only two cars ahead. Missing dipping sauce.
Tables were sticky and floor had spilled soda. Trash bins overflowing.
Dining area was loud but clean. Music was too loud to hear my own thoughts.

Restroom was spotless and dining area tables were wiped down frequently.

Standard wait time. Nothing special about the speed today.
